Name: FDepthFieldGlowInfo
Description: info for glow when using depth field rendering

Variables.Name: bEnableGlow
Variables.Description: whether to turn on the outline glow (depth field fonts only)

Variables.Name: GlowColor
Variables.Description: base color to use for the glow

Variables.Name: GlowOuterRadius
Variables.Description:
if bEnableGlow, outline glow outer radius (0 to 1, 0.5 is edge of character silhouette)
	  glow influence will be 0 at GlowOuterRadius.X and 1 at GlowOuterRadius.Y

Variables.Name: GlowInnerRadius
Variables.Description:
if bEnableGlow, outline glow inner radius (0 to 1, 0.5 is edge of character silhouette)
	  glow influence will be 1 at GlowInnerRadius.X and 0 at GlowInnerRadius.Y
